title: Can't copy table into another table with constraints (mkey.bulk_rotate_xor_hash)
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test2 (order_number INTEGER IDENTITY, order_id INTEGER NOT NULL, qnt INTEGER NOT NULL);
CREATE TABLE test1 (id INTEGER NOT NULL, qnt INTEGER, order_number INTEGER NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY (id, qnt), FOREIGN KEY (order_number) REFERENCES test2(order_number));
INSERT INTO test1 (id, qnt, order_number) SELECT order_id, qnt, order_number FROM test2 WHERE order_id IS NOT NULL;
INSERT INTO test1 (id, qnt, order_number) SELECT CASE WHEN order_id = 1 THEN NULL ELSE order_id END, CASE WHEN qnt = 10 THEN NULL ELSE qnt END, order_number FROM test2;
key_bug_features: Copying table data with foreign key constraints
